expectations.text: Report file exists matching comparison naming convention *-compare-*-vs-*.md
expectations.evidence: File is named aeo-geo-comparison-report.md — does not match the naming convention.

expectations.text: Report contains a side-by-side comparison table with scores for both domains
expectations.evidence: Has a comparison summary table with scores (72 vs 55) and separate summary table file.

expectations.text: Report focuses on AEO and GEO categories — no SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, or Structured Data scoring
expectations.evidence: Report drifts into TTFB comparisons (52ms vs 272ms), meta descriptions, hreflang, og:type, and llms.txt analysis beyond AEO/GEO.

expectations.text: Report contains data from both docs.anthropic.com AND platform.openai.com (not just one site)
expectations.evidence: Both sites analysed with specific data points from each.

expectations.text: Report includes a top 3 fixes section for each site
expectations.evidence: No structured top 3 fixes per site section. Findings are mixed across the report.

expectations.text: Report identifies which site performs better per category with reasoning
expectations.evidence: 'OpenAI wins the AEO/GEO comparison 72 vs 55' with reasoning about llms.txt and markdown endpoints.
